— Font alternatives

Sans candidates for the texture-modernist site.

Each card renders the same hero, section heading, lede, and stat in a different family. Bricolage Grotesque (the current) is at the top for reference. Loaded from Google Fonts and Fontshare CDNs — preview only.

Bricolage GrotesqueInterInter TightManropeIBM Plex SansSpace GroteskDM SansGeistOnestSoraPlus Jakarta SansSatoshiGeneral SansCabinet Grotesk
Bricolage Grotesque current
— Approach

Technology
that serves people.

AI and data solutions grounded in ethics. Systems built with transparency, accountability, and human impact at the core.

Recent projects

A few examples of how the practice plays out — production systems, research tools, end-to-end builds. Molcajete: an AI-powered transcription pipeline. Adapta: LLM fine-tuning infrastructure for political analysis. Judex: a Python library for scraping the Brazilian Supreme Court.

07+ 04 02
